---
name: Theme Information Issue
about: Report incorrect theme metadata, broken links, screenshots, or other registry issues in the RusherHacks Plugin Collection.
title: "[THEME ISSUE] "
labels: issue
assignees: GarlicRot
---

## RusherHacks Plugin Collection

Use this template to report problems with a theme entry in the registry.

> Routine generated file updates are handled automatically.  
> This template is mainly for reporting incorrect metadata, broken assets, or missing information.

## Issue Type

- [ ] Incorrect release information
- [ ] Incorrect or broken download URL
- [ ] Typo or formatting issue
- [ ] Incorrect screenshot or video
- [ ] Missing screenshot or media
- [ ] Incorrect creator information
- [ ] Other

## Theme Name

Specify the exact theme name.

## Theme Repository

Link the theme repository, if available.

## Description

Describe the issue clearly and briefly.

## Correct Information

If you know the correct information, include it here.

Examples:
- corrected release tag
- corrected download URL
- corrected screenshot or video link
- corrected text or formatting
- corrected creator information

## Additional Context

Add anything else that may help, such as:
- screenshots
- related links
- notes about what looks wrong
- where the incorrect info appears in the repo/site

## Priority

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
